objective: Validate the repaired Solution C baseline on remote A40 hardware, confirm clean checkpoint behavior, and record a reproducible dev-set benchmark.

commands.train: ssh root@194.68.245.210 -p 22141 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && ln -sf official_coursework/trial_data/ED_trial.csv test.csv && source .venv/bin/activate && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_002 && jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_002 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0 2>&1 | tee experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_002/stdout.log'

notes: Remote A40 plain-Trainer run completed cleanly. Direct checkpoint evaluation from outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer/best_model reproduced the epoch-3 notebook metrics, produced a non-degenerate prediction distribution, and beat the official ED LSTM baseline on accuracy, macro_f1, and MCC. The pod environment still shows a slow transformers import in env_probe.json, but it did not block the validated run.
